title: KLA (KLAC) Just Overtook the 50-Day Moving Average
text: Is it a good or bad thing when a stock surpasses resistance at the 50-day simple moving average?

title: KLA (KLAC) Just Overtook the 20-Day Moving Average
text: When a stock breaks out above the 20-day simple moving average, good things could be on the horizon. How should investors react?

title: KLA: Highest Profitability In Semiconductor Equipment Sub-Industry
text: As the market leader with over 50% market share, we determined its advantage with its wide portfolio breadth and forecasted its revenue growth at 6.1% beyond 2022. Also, we believe its stable installed base growth could support its services revenue growth outlook and forecasted its revenue growth in line with its products revenue growth.
